title: CancelShipmentModal
description: Modal that captures cancellation reason + optional remarks.

open.description: Whether the modal is visible. Bind to a state slot.

workflowId.description: ID of the workflow to cancel. Bind to a datasource field.

apiMode.description: `mock` simulates the API locally; `real` proxies to the gocomet workflow endpoint via the renderer's /api/widgets/cancel-shipment route.

mockMode.description: Only used when apiMode='mock'. Toggles deterministic mock outcome.

mockDelayMs.description: Phase A only — artificial latency for the mock submit.

successEventName.description: Event name emitted on the eventBus on success.

errorEventName.description: Event name emitted on the eventBus on failure.

cancelEventName.description: Event name emitted on the eventBus when the user dismisses.
